query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_sops (
  id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  category VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  csu_subject_ref VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  procedure_text LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
  decision_logic TEXT NULL,
  tribal_knowledge TEXT NULL,
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_vintage_notes (
  id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  sop_id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
  vintage_year INT NOT NULL,
  what_worked TEXT NULL,
  what_failed TEXT NULL,
  seasonal_observations TEXT NULL,
  winemaker_notes TEXT NULL,
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_training_records (
  id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  session_title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  session_date DATE NOT NULL,
  trainer_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  topics_covered TEXT NOT NULL,
  trainees TEXT NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT NULL,
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
